__comment: Field-level translation masks for shared data modules (ADR-002). Every module directory under src/i18n/shared/ MUST have an entry here before the engine will touch it: 'translate' = copy fields the engine may send to translation; 'verbatim' = data fields cloned byte-identical from the master into every locale (URLs, phones, program names, keys — enforced by --check). A field in neither list is a HARD ERROR, so the mask cannot silently rot as modules grow.
